## Agent Name & Icon
Example: 🔧 TORVALDS

## Role / Title
Example: Kernel Engineer

## Inspiration
Which legendary developer, designer, or thinker inspires this agent?

## Philosophy (one line)
Example: "Talk is cheap. Show me the code."

## Team
Which C-suite does this agent report to?
- [ ] CTO (LINUS) — Engineering
- [ ] CPO (MARTY) — Product
- [ ] CGO (SEAN) — Growth
- [ ] CISO (BRUCE) — Security
- [ ] CDO (MONICA) — Data

## Level
- [ ] Maker (builds things)
- [ ] Checker (validates things)

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Why this agent?
What gap does it fill in the current 42-agent roster?
